subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends and discerning, cultured handmaidens! The light of truth hath shone upon heart and sight, illuminating them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز و کنیزان بافرهنگ و تمیز پرتو حقیقت بر دل و دیده زد آنرا روشن
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @high station of the true believer, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
